summary: Added a reusable Path Map detail view that turns each lane's checkpoints, gates, outcomes, and trail records into a spatial route board with future unlock slots and expandable event history.

queries: interactive timeline branching quest map UX pattern dashboard milestones blockers
game quest log map milestones blockers UI design pattern
project roadmap dependency map dashboard visual milestones blockers
pattern_notes: Dependency maps are useful when blockers and handoffs must be visible before they delay work.
Interactive timelines work best when users can reveal more context on demand instead of seeing every event at once.
Game-like quest logs benefit from mixing current objective, completed milestones, locked gates, and future slots.

ui_contract: Add a sixth lane detail tab named Path Map.
Render route nodes for spawn, checkpoints, gates, unlocks, and the next future unlock slot.
Show route depth, checkpoint progress, gate count, and unlock count.
Provide a blocker radar card with a Comms shortcut.
Reuse the existing expandable trail limit so large lanes reveal more route events in chunks.
Derive visuals from lane art, minigame texture, accent colors, and snapshot data without mutating the data.

checks: 390x920 viewport: Path Map deep link rendered 6 tabs, 11 route nodes, 1 future node, 18 visible event chips, no horizontal overflow, no console errors, and no failed responses.
1280x800 viewport: Path Map rendered 6 route columns, no horizontal overflow, and the Comms shortcut changed the hash to #lane=money_source_discovery&view=comms with the command deck visible.

1280x800 interaction: returning to Path Map and pressing Reveal expanded visible route event chips from 18 to 36 and updated the button text from Reveal 18 more route events to Reveal 7 more route events.
1600x900 viewport: Path Map deep link remained active with no console errors, no failed responses, and no offscreen route nodes.
